calendar.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this schedule?
calendar.title: Your calendar

errors.invalidDependentProfile: Invalid dependent profile. Go back to the list and open the profile again.
errors.dependentUnlinked: This dependent is no longer linked to your account. Refresh the home screen and pair again.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.subtitle: Caretakers and dependents will see this name in the app.
name.errorMinLength: Enter at least 2 characters — e.g. a name or nickname.
name.errorMaxLength: This field can be at most 80 characters.
name.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.

consents.title: Your comfort comes first

privacy.title: Privacy protection
privacy.body: We protect your data and use it only to run the app and as required by law.

analytics.title: Improving your experience
analytics.body: We may collect anonymous usage statistics to improve features and stability.

legal.body: By using bApka you accept our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

consents.withdrawNote: You can withdraw consent in app settings.

pick.title: Welcome
pick.subtitle: Choose whether to create a new account or sign in to an existing one.

register.title: Registration
register.hint: Create a caretaker or dependent account.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.hint: Enter the credentials for your existing account.

auth.validationPasswordLength: Password should be at least 6 characters
auth.errorLoginFallback: Invalid email or password, or no server connection.
auth.errorRegisterFallback: Check your details or connection and try again.

google.errorFallback: Could not sign in with Google.

role.title: Choose your role
role.subtitle: We'll tailor the app to your needs.

caretaker.title: Caretaker
caretaker.desc: You manage schedules and medications for your dependent.

dependent.title: Dependent
dependent.desc: You get reminders and can easily mark activities as done.

role.errorUpdate: Could not update role. Please try again.

seniorType.title: How do you want to use the app?
seniorType.subtitle: Pick the mode that fits your situation.

withCaretaker.title: With a caretaker
withCaretaker.desc: Your caretaker sets the schedule; you use reminders.

independent.title: On my own
independent.desc: You manage medications and activities yourself.

notification.subtitleCaretaker: We'll notify you about important events for your dependents.
notification.subtitleDependent: We'll remind you about medications and calendar activities.

enterPin.title: Enter PIN code
enterPin.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code shown on your caretaker's device.

pairing.alertInvalidPin: The PIN code is invalid or has expired.

sounds.sectionMedicationSubtitleCaretaker: Reminder sound for your dependent's medications.
sounds.sectionMedicationSubtitleDependent: Reminder sound for medications and activities.
sounds.sectionSosSubtitle: Separate sound for the SOS alarm.
sounds.webHint: Preview may be muted in the browser — you'll hear the full sound on your phone.

dashboard.title: Your dependents
dashboard.subtitle: Pick a profile to view their schedule and meds.
dashboard.addCardSubtitle: Pair an account with a PIN code
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Add your first dependent to manage their schedule.

insights.title: Insights
insights.dosesEmpty: No dose data in this range.
insights.moodEmpty: No mood entries in this range.

vitals.title: Measurements
vitals.empty: No measurements recorded in this range.

settings.title: Dependent settings
settings.seniorSectionHint: These changes apply on the dependent's phone.
settings.moodSub: When off — the mood tile disappears and "Take medicine" spans full width.
settings.vitalsSub: After confirming a glucose or blood pressure activity, the senior fills in a results form.
settings.caretakerLanguageSub: Caretaker panel language on this device.
settings.soundHint: Medication reminder sound on the senior's phone.

pairing.title: Add dependent
pairing.instructions: Ask your dependent to choose "I have a caretaker" and enter the code below.
pairing.hint: You can select the code and copy it manually.

today.allDoneHint: No more activities scheduled for today.

dependent.moodThanks: Thank you for letting us know.
dependent.mainDue: Take your medicine or do your exercises — it's time from your calendar.
dependent.mainEmpty: No activity is required by your caretaker's calendar right now.
dependent.mainAllDone: That's all for today — no more planned activities.
dependent.mainMissedHint: 15 minutes have passed since the scheduled time. This activity was marked as missed.
dependent.errorMarkMissed: Could not mark this activity as missed.
dependent.sosMessage: You tapped the SOS button. No notification was sent to your caretaker in this version.
dependent.errorMarkTaken: Could not record this on the server. Please try again.

home.sosConfirm: Are you sure you want to alert your caretaker?
home.confirmMedGeneric: Do you confirm taking the medicine?

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageHint: Every change needs your confirmation. Nothing is saved until you confirm.
settings.moodPickerSub: Ask how you feel after activities.
settings.soundHint: Pick the system sound or a built-in local tone. Tap a row to select (with confirmation). Use the speaker to preview.
settings.soundChangeMessage: Use "{{label}}" for medication reminders on this device?
settings.confirmColorBlindOffMsg: Colours and emphasis will return to the standard style.
settings.confirmColorBlindOnMsg: Uses stronger outlines and avoids easy-to-confuse colour pairs.
settings.confirmHighContrastOffMsg: The screen will use the standard contrast again.
settings.confirmHighContrastOnMsg: Text and buttons will use very high contrast for easier reading.
settings.confirmMoodOffMsg: The mood picking screen will no longer appear after taking medications.
settings.confirmMoodOnMsg: The mood picking screen will appear after you take medications.

metrics.title: Health measurements
metrics.hint: Enter your measurements (e.g. blood pressure or glucose).

calendar.emptyDay: No medicine planned for this day.
calendar.activityLegend: Colored box — something is planned that day

hybrid.treatmentsSubtitle: Your treatments and activities — manage them on your own.

settings.sectionHint: Adjust the app to your needs.

hybrid.pinBanner: Secure the app with a 4-digit PIN.

add.title: Add to calendar
add.pickActivityLead: Select an activity from your dependent's kit to add to the calendar.
add.pickFrequencyLead: Choose whether this is a one-time dose, ongoing, or only for a set period.
add.frequencyOnceHint: A single reminder on the day you pick.
add.frequencyRegularHint: Repeats on selected weekdays with no end date.
add.frequencyPeriodHint: Like regular, but only between two dates.
add.pickTimingLeadOnce: Select the day for this one-time reminder.
add.pickTimingLeadRegular: Choose which weekdays this repeats on.
add.pickTimingLeadPeriod: Mark the start and end dates on the calendar.
add.pickTimeLeadMed: Set the time and how many to take.
add.timeHint: Swipe or use the buttons below
add.activitiesEmpty: Add an activity in the Treatment tab first.
add.weekdaysHint: You can limit days within a temporary period.
add.rangeSet: Range set. Tap another day to start over.
add.rangeStart: Select the start date of the period
add.rangeEnd: Now select the end date of the period

list.title: Medical activities
list.subtitle: Manage activities assigned to your dependent.
list.empty: No activities yet. Add the first one with the + button.

add.title: New activity
add.lead: Choose activity type and fill in details.
add.name: Name
add.helper: Helps predict when medication runs out.
